# Toast

Toast notifications for displaying brief, non-intrusive messages to users. Consists of a `Toaster` component to mount in your app and a `toaster` imperative API to trigger toasts.

## Import

```jsx
import { Toaster, toaster } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Exports

| Export | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Toaster` | Component | Mount this component once at the root of your app to enable toasts. |
| `toaster` | Object | Imperative API to create and manage toasts programmatically. |

## toaster.create() Options

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `title` | `string` | - | The title of the toast. |
| `description` | `string` | - | The description or body text of the toast. |
| `type` | `"info" \| "warning" \| "success" \| "error" \| "loading"` | `"info"` | The type/status of the toast. |
| `duration` | `number` | `5000` | Duration in milliseconds before the toast auto-dismisses. |
| `action` | `{ label: string, onClick: () => void }` | - | An optional action button inside the toast. |
| `placement` | `"top" \| "top-start" \| "top-end" \| "bottom" \| "bottom-start" \| "bottom-end"` | `"bottom-end"` | Where the toast appears on screen. |

## Usage

### Mount the Toaster

Place the `Toaster` component once at the root of your application:

```jsx
import { Toaster } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

function App() {
  return (
    <>
      <Toaster />
      {/* rest of your app */}
    </>
  );
}
```

### Create a Toast

```jsx
import { toaster } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

function handleSave() {
  toaster.create({
    title: "Saved successfully",
    description: "Your changes have been saved.",
    type: "success",
    duration: 3000,
  });
}
```

### Toast with Action

```jsx
toaster.create({
  title: "File deleted",
  description: "The file has been moved to trash.",
  type: "info",
  action: {
    label: "Undo",
    onClick: () => restoreFile(),
  },
});
```

### Toast Placement

```jsx
toaster.create({
  title: "New notification",
  type: "info",
  placement: "top-end",
});
```
